name: Minecraft ©️
description:
MINECRAFT RPG

Use /cmd to shape the world summon villagers, spawn items, and teleport. But don’t abuse it or Herobrine will come for you.

CURRENT MOBS: Iron golem, wolves that could transform into hot furries, zombies, slime, villagers, the fleshcrafter, other animal, glow squids and herobrine!!

Examples:

/cmd summon villager “ Spawns a villager.

/cmd give diamond_sword “ Grants a weapon.

/cmd summon horny villager “ Uh be careful.

Break the rules, and strange things will start happening glitches, whispers, and something watching you.

(had to change the picture cuz the filter is becoming more severe..)
